class.name: ARHandAnchor
class.brief_description: Represents a tracked hand with skeletal joint data.
class.description: Provides the pose, chirality (left/right), tracking state, and optional [ARHandSkeleton] for a detected hand. Delivered via the [signal ARSession.hand_anchor_updated] signal. [b]visionOS only.[/b] Hand tracking on iOS uses the Vision framework, not ARKit. On iOS and macOS, this type exists for API consistency but is never populated with real data.

members.member: Which hand this anchor represents. See [enum Chirality].
A unique identifier for this hand anchor.
Whether the hand currently has reliable tracking data.
The tracked hand skeleton, if available.
The hand anchor transform in world space.

constants.constant: The anchor represents the left hand.
The anchor represents the right hand.
